name: wakewait
description: Efficient native shell sleep for Codex.

interface.shortDescription: Efficient native shell sleep for Codex.
interface.longDescription: WakeWait is a skill-only Codex plugin that guides agents to use native shell sleep commands such as PowerShell Start-Sleep or POSIX sleep, print a wake timestamp, and avoid model calls while idle. It intentionally does not install a CLI, write state files, patch runtimes, or run background workers.
defaultPrompt: Use WakeWait for a 10-minute native shell sleep.
Wait with the host shell, print the wake time, then check a log.
